markdown.name: Markdown
markdown.description: Markdown is a lightweight markup language with a plain text formatting syntax. It is designed to be easy to read and write, and is widely used in documentation, web pages, and other text-based formats.

guide.name: Guide
guide.description: A guide is a document that provides instructions or information about a product or service. It is designed to be easy to read and write, and is widely used in documentation, web pages, and other text-based formats.
